Lead the software team in developing the robot’s code.
Work with the mechanical and electrical teams to ensure the robot is functional.

index.title: Home
index.content:
Adan Silva - Cybersecurity Student
Introduction
My name is Adan Silva. I am an incoming college at California Polytechnic State University - San Luis Obispo, where I am pursuing a BS in CS with a concentration in Data Privacy and Security.
I currently work as a Jr. SOC Analyst student assistant for Cal Poly’s ITS department, where I perform daily SOC tasks and related projects. In conjugation, I also do additional internship work for NGHTWLL Consulting LLC on the side.
I have earned my CompTIA ITF+ and Security+, and I am working on earning my Cisco CCNA.
Welcome to my personal website! Here, I have details about my portfolio along with where I host my Hack The Box writeups as well. If you are interested in those, make sure to check them out!
